Stage 4 Pressure Ulcers Discharge Number will be displayed CHAR 1 This indicates the number of unhealed Stage 4 pressure ulcers that were present at the time of discharge.
265 WORSENING_STG_2_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM WORSENING_STG_2_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM M0800A Worsening Stage 2 Pressure Ulcers Number CHAR 1 The number of current stage 2 pressure ulcers that were not present or were at a lesser stage on admission. If no current pressure ulcer at a given stage, enter 0..
266 WORSENING_STG_3_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM
